min.description: Lower bound for the range. Defaults to 0.

max.description: Upper bound for the range. Defaults to 100.

low.description: Lower threshold boundary for segmented rendering.

high.description: Upper threshold boundary for segmented rendering.

optimum.description:
Optimal target value. Influences computed state semantics to match native
meter expectations.

size.description: Size token for track height. Default `md`.

ariaValueText.description:
Human-readable text exposed via `aria-valuetext`.
Example: `50% (6 hours remaining)`.

ariaLabel.description:
Accessible name applied directly to the meter element when no visible
label element is present.

ariaLabelledby.description:
Id of a visible element that serves as the accessible name for the meter.
Prefer this when a visible label exists.
